features: Aquafresh Triple Protection Fluoride Toothpaste Value Pack Size 100ml X 12
description: Product description Aquafresh Triple Protection Fluoride Toothpaste Value Pack Size 100ml X 12 Directions Apply a small amount of paste to the toothbrush, brush in circular motions for 2 minutes, focus on all surfaces of the teeth and rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning For outdoor use only. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use and consult a dentist if irritation. See more
